relation.description: Relation URI from the namespace registry. Examples: `memory:prefers`, `intent:goal`. See spec §9.

value.description: The value carried by a fact. One of seven types defined in spec §2.1: plain string, number, boolean, null, long-form `text`, ISO 8601 `datetime`, or entity `ref`.

text.description: Long-form text value (e.g. agent notes, summaries).

ref.description: Reference to another entity URI. Used to build typed relations.

value.title: FactValue

source.description: Source agent or system URI. Example: `agent:settings-sync`.

confidence.description: Confidence score 0–1. Facts with `confidence: 0` are retracted.

scope.description: Visibility scope for a fact. `local` and `team` scopes are never federated (except with `STIGMEM_FEDERATION_ALLOW_TEAM=true`). See spec §2.2.
scope.title: FactScope

valid_until.description: Optional expiry datetime (UTC). Expired facts are excluded from query results unless `include_expired=true`. See spec §3.
